---
ID: US-OLV-034
Title: Track account opportunities
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-16
Milestone: Port Accounts UX and complete module hub shell

As a account manager
I want to manage opportunities tied to an account
So that potential revenue is tracked before becoming projects

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] OpportunitiesSection renders opportunity cards for the selected account.
- [ ] Users can add, edit, and delete opportunities.
- [ ] Stakeholders/owners can be attached through picker controls.
- [ ] Promoting an opportunity creates or moves data toward a project after confirmation.

Notes: Promotion includes caveats for stakeholder data loss where applicable.
---
